programs.title: Kath & Kim Kountdown: The Glitz & The Glama
programs.desc: You'll be loving yourself sick as you watch the fans' favourite fashion moments from a Bo-Peep Bride to a Burberry bikini. From the first use of the expression 'muffin top' to 'a bit of huffy puffy'.

programs.desc: Kai and Master Zia must get back her stolen ship.

programs.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programs.desc: Dr Gillman offers Mavis a witch's wart to cover up her new zit. But that wart allows Mavis entree into the secret 'witches only' lair and opens her eyes to a whole new underworld.

programs.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programs.sub_title: When The Afterlife Gives You Phlegmonade
programs.desc: Werewolf twins, Sophie and Charlotte, are trying to sell their phlegmonade, but they can't stop fighting and arguing. So Mavis proposes a break - a twin vacation.
